question: Which order have the least sum of the product prices. List the order id and sum.
sql: SELECT order_id, SUM(Products.product_price) AS total_price FROM Order_Items JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id GROUP BY order_id ORDER BY total_price ASC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 汇总订单中特定商品的总价格

semantic.reason: 原始问题未指定商品名称和订单状态过滤条件，但SQL描述中包含这两个过滤条件，导致统计范围不一致
